title: feroxbuster
html:
feroxbuster

Aggressive recursive content discovery. Automatically follows directories it finds and scans deeper. Use when you need thorough coverage.

Basic Usage

# Default scan
feroxbuster -u http://target

# With wordlist
feroxbuster -u http://target -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-directories.txt

# With extensions
feroxbuster -u http://target -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-words.txt -x php,asp,aspx,html,txt,bak,old,json,xml

Recursion Control

# Set recursion depth (default: 4)
feroxbuster -u http://target --depth 2

# No recursion (single level only)
feroxbuster -u http://target --no-recursion

# Don't recurse into specific dirs
feroxbuster -u http://target --dont-scan /assets/ --dont-scan /images/

Filtering Responses

# Filter by status code
feroxbuster -u http://target --filter-status 404,403,500

# Filter by response size (bytes)
feroxbuster -u http://target --filter-size 0

# Filter by word count
feroxbuster -u http://target --filter-words 42

# Filter by line count
feroxbuster -u http://target --filter-lines 10

# Filter by regex in response body
feroxbuster -u http://target --filter-regex "Page Not Found"

# Only show specific status codes
feroxbuster -u http://target --status-codes 200,301,302

Speed & Performance

# Thread count (default: 50)
feroxbuster -u http://target -t 100

# Rate limit (requests per second)
feroxbuster -u http://target --rate-limit 50

# Timeout per request (seconds)
feroxbuster -u http://target --timeout 10

Output

# Save to file
feroxbuster -u http://target -o results.txt

# JSON output
feroxbuster -u http://target -o results.json --json

# Silent mode (less terminal noise)
feroxbuster -u http://target --silent

Authentication & Headers

# Cookie auth
feroxbuster -u http://target -b "session=abc123"

# Custom headers
feroxbuster -u http://target -H "Authorization: Bearer TOKEN"

# Proxy through Burp
feroxbuster -u http://target -p http://127.0.0.1:8080

# Insecure (skip TLS verify)
feroxbuster -u https://target -k

Scan Control

# Force scan even on wildcard responses
feroxbuster -u http://target --force-recursion

# Add trailing slash to requests
feroxbuster -u http://target --add-slash

# Follow redirects
feroxbuster -u http://target -r

# HTTP methods
feroxbuster -u http://target -m GET,POST

# User-agent
feroxbuster -u http://target -a "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64)"

Resume & State

# Auto-saves state file on ctrl+c / crash — resume with:
feroxbuster --resume-from ferox-state.json

HTB Common Combos

# Thorough PHP scan
feroxbuster -u http://target -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-words.txt -x php,phps,php.bak -t 80 --depth 3

# Quick look
feroxbuster -u http://target -w /usr/share/wordlists/dirb/common.txt --no-recursion

# Through Burp with extensions
feroxbuster -u http://target -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/directory-list-2.3-medium.txt -x php,txt,html -p http://127.0.0.1:8080

Common Wordlists

/usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-directories.txt   - general directories
/usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-words.txt         - general words
/usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/directory-list-2.3-medium.txt - classic
/usr/share/wordlists/dirb/common.txt                                    - quick common paths
/usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/big.txt                       - thorough
